title: SENTINEL APEX Zero-Day Advisory: MICROSOFT
content:
Entity: MICROSOFT
Alert Type: KEV Rapid Addition
Exploitation Status: CONFIRMED
Confidence: 0.95
Chain Evidence: kev_add
Recommended Actions:
  - CRITICAL: Patch or isolate systems affected by MICROSOFT
  - IMMEDIATE: Assess exposure to MICROSOFT
  - Deploy emergency detection rules (Sigma/YARA/Suricata)
  - Activate incident response team
  - Brief CISO on active exploitation risk
